headlines.title: Super Typhoon Bavi
headlines.summary: The third category 5 tropical cyclone of 2026 crossed the U.S. Northern Mariana Islands and Guam before continuing toward Asia.

headlines.title: Students Connect NASA Science With Indigenous Knowledge to Study Coastal Erosion
headlines.summary: For the Pleasant Point Passamaquoddy Reservation, or Sipayik, the ocean has always been a teacher. Situated in what is known as Downeast Maine, along the shores of Passamaquoddy Bay, generations of Indigenous people have
